name: tpu
description: Specialised Claude assistance for working with Google Cloud TPU v6e VMs. Skills for spinning up VMs (with the right Cloud NAT + IAP firewall + Private Google Access in any region), bootstrapping the python venv (uv + jax-from-git + tunix + libtpu), opening IAP-tunnelled SSH + Jupyter port-forwards, and tearing down. Captures the recipes and pitfalls learned from the tpu-2026 project (PPA blocked from internal-IP VMs, libtpu needed for jax, flax install order, etc.).
